case_title: ANNA WODKOWSKA VS. SAKS FIFTH AVENUE INCORPORATED

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY WODKOWSKA, ANNA SAKS FIFTH AVENUE INCORPORATED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WODKOWSKA, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT SAKS FIFTH AVENUE INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE NOT ENTERED: SUB-SERVICE, NO MAILING DATE. (SERVICE FEE $100.00)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WODKOWSKA, ANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAKS FIFTH AVENUE INCORPORATED PLAINTIFF HAS DECLINED TO PROVIDE INFORMATION NECESSARY TO VERIFY THE PURCHASE AND PROCEED WITH DEFENDANT'S STATED PROTOCOL FOR A POSSIBLE EXCHANGE, REPLACEMENT OR CREDIT OF PURCHASE. DEFENDANT SHALL RETURN THE BRACELET INVOLVED IN THIS MATTER TO PLAINTIFF WITH CONFIRMATION OF DELIVERY TO PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS IDENTIFIED IN THE COMPLAINT. DELIVERY TO BE MADE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
